segment.source: Renders one card holding a row of headline metrics as a definition list — each with label, value, and optional change figure with a colored up/down/neutral trend arrow — plus a period badge and rich-text summary. Use it for: report summaries, monthly figures with growth percentages, traffic or sales snapshots in source documents. Prefer 'KPI Cards' for one card per metric, 'Metric Dashboard' when a chart is needed, 'Stats Section' for plain marketing numbers.
